description: An accountant needs to create an accrual journal entry for expenses that have been incurred but not yet invoiced.

nodes.task_description: Identify services that have been received but for which no invoice has been received (e.g., consulting services).

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies $10,000 in consulting services that need to be accrued.

nodes.task_description: Create an accrual journal entry to debit the expense account and credit the accrued liabilities account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the correct journal entry for the accrual.

nodes.task_description: Set up a reversing entry for the beginning of the next month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules the accrual to automatically reverse on the first day of the next period.
